mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM SWC_USER u INNER JOIN SWC_USER_AUTHOR ua ON u.USER_ID = ua.USER_ID INNER JOIN SWC_AUTHOR a ON ua.AUTHOR_ID = a.AUTHOR_ID WHERE a.AUTHOR_CODE = 'ROLE_ADMIN' AND u.USER_USE = 'Y' AND a.AUTHOR_USE = 'Y'
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO SWC_USER ( USER_ID, USER_LOGIN_ID, USER_NM, USER_PASSWORD, USER_EMAIL, USER_USE, USER_LOCK, REGIST_DT, UPDT_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{loginId}, #{userName}, #{password}, #{email}, #{userUse}, #{userLock}, #{registDt}, #{registDt} )
INSERT INTO SWC_USER_AUTHOR ( USER_ID, AUTHOR_ID, REGIST_DT, UPDT_DT ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{authorId}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
